zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Lowther Knt.於1510年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親Sir John Lowther23歲，母親Lucy Curwen23歲。他於1529年與Lady Dorothy Clifford在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年3月10日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Lowther Knt.于1510年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德时，他的父亲Sir John Lowther23岁，母亲Lucy Curwen23岁。他于1529年与Lady Dorothy Clifford在英国英格兰越可爾斯吉普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年3月10日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Lowther Knt. was born in 1510, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Lowther, was 23 and his mother, Lucy Curwen, was 23. He married Lady Dorothy Clifford in 1529, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 March 1555, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Lowther Knt. est né en 1510, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Lowther, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lucy Curwen, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Dorothy Clifford en 1529, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1555, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Lowther Knt. 1510 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Lowther 23 und seine Mutter Lucy Curwen 23. Er hat 1529 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Dorothy Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1555 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Dorothy Clifford nel 1529, nel Skipton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther Knt.が1510年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Sir John Lowtherは23歳，母Lucy Curwenは23歳であった。1529年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンでLady Dorothy Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年3月10日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther Knt.(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Lowther(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Curwen(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 Lady Dorothy Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Lowther Knt. nasceu em 1510, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Lowther, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Curwen, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Dorothy Clifford em 1529, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1555, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Lowther Knt. родился в 1510 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Lowther было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Curwen, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Dorothy Clifford в 1529 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 марта 1555 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности лоутир кастл, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 10 de marzo de 1555, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
